title: VITA Expo — Complete Mobile Platform
description: Full React Native mobile app with all screens + Supabase + 4 health data source integrations

stories.title: Navigation + bottom tabs (5 tabs)
acceptanceCriteria: expo-router or react-navigation configured with 5 bottom tabs
Tabs: 홈(dashboard), 보호자(guardian), 관제(org), 캐시(vital-cash), 설정(settings)
Active tab shows teal accent + indicator line
Each tab is a proper screen component
TypeScript compiles with no errors

stories.title: Guardian screen — family list + detail view
acceptanceCriteria: Guardian screen lists 3 family members (아버지/어머니/삼촌) with different health statuses
Each member card shows: avatar, name, relation+age, VITA Score color-coded, status badge, 4 vital icons+values
Tap member card navigates to detail screen
Detail screen shows: profile header, active alerts, 4 vital cards, 7-day trend chart, AI coaching, activity
Mock data matches web version (안종현/박순자/이범수 with 87/62/38 scores)
Dark theme with glow cards, Korean labels

stories.title: Vital Cash screen (rewards + earning rules + transaction history)
acceptanceCriteria: Balance card shows current points (12,400P) with monthly earned/burned
Earning rules grid: 6 rules (sleep, morning, stress, family, fandom, medication)
Redemption options: subscription discount, Vital Mall, partner benefits
Transaction history list with earn/burn indicators
Dark theme with gold glow on balance card
Korean labels

stories.title: Subscription screen (3-tier plans + payment history)
acceptanceCriteria: Current plan card showing Premium status
3 plan cards: Basic 19,900 / Premium 29,900 / Platinum 49,900
Each plan shows features list with checkmarks
Selected/current plan visually distinct
Payment history list (4 entries)
Korean labels, dark theme

stories.title: Settings screen + health data source connections
acceptanceCriteria: Profile section with 안종현 name + email + Premium badge
Notification toggles (daily, anomaly, weekly, marketing)
Data sharing toggles (insurance, research)
Connected health sources section listing: VitalRing, Apple HealthKit, Samsung Health, Garmin Connect
Each source shows connection status (연결됨/미연결) and sync button
Korean labels, dark theme

stories.title: Organization dashboard (B2B/B2G monitoring)
acceptanceCriteria: Org header: 화성시 통합돌봄센터
4 stat cards: 전체/정상/주의/위험 counts
Real-time alerts list (4 alerts: 2 critical, 2 warning) with muted colors (not bright)
Weekly stats cards: 수면/스트레스/VITA Score
Member list table with 10 Korean seniors
Dark theme, Korean labels

stories.title: Supabase client setup
acceptanceCriteria: lib/supabase.ts exports configured client
Env vars read from expo-constants or .env
Auth helper functions: signIn, signUp, signOut, getSession
TypeScript compiles with no errors

stories.title: Health data source integration stubs (4 sources)
acceptanceCriteria: lib/health/vitalring.ts - VitalRing API client stub
lib/health/apple-healthkit.ts - HealthKit integration stub with react-native-health comments
lib/health/samsung-health.ts - Samsung Health integration stub
lib/health/garmin.ts - Garmin Health API OAuth + REST client stub
lib/health/aggregator.ts - merges data from all sources with priority rules
Each exports typed functions with mock responses
TypeScript compiles with no errors

stories.title: Deploy to Vercel + GitHub update
acceptanceCriteria: git commit with all changes
git push to https://github.com/antryu/vita-expo
Vercel deployment succeeds at https://vita-expo.vercel.app
All 5 tab screens accessible on web build
